data.title: BLMD

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Like every sustain hero, Balmond synergizes well with Angela as it increases his sustainability and tankiness that allows him to soak up even more damage while Angela keeps healing him.

If your team is playing a double fighter composition, then Ruby can pair up with Balmond and they can be an amazing frontline duo since both soaks up damage really well with their skills by spell vamp.

counters.counter_desc: Balmond struggles with heroes that have high mobility and can easily dodge his skills, Benedetta is one of them. Her kit involves dashing to enemies and it can be used to escape making it challenging to chase her.

After patch 2.1.60, Balmond can effectively counter Yu Zhong and zone him out with his second skill delaying his minion wave. Although Yu Zhong becomes stronger progressively, Balmond can go toe-to-toe with Yu Zhong in isolated fights.

Balmond is a great counter for Sun as his kit heavily relies on his clones which Balmond benefits from, as his passive easily gets triggered and the spell vamp output of his second skill increases significantly.

dominants.dominant_desc: Balmond can go toe-to-toe with some heroes at Level 1 and clear minion waves fast. Try to take the EXP Crab whenever possible if not, just clear your waves and play safely. Even if you have the upper hand, it's best not to overextend, your goal in the early game is to reach level 4 fast.

Balmond has access to his ultimate now, a really useful tool in the first turtle fight, with enough precision, you can pair this up with your jungler's retribution and secure the turtle almost every time. This is also the phase where Balmond shines and his durability usually peaks since he has built one of his core items.

In the early stages of the Late Game, a Balmond with its core items can be scary like most sustain heroes due to his spell vamp, but as the game progresses longer, Balmond can be easily bursted down and his effectiveness dwindles over time. If the game had progressed in longer games, make sure to always stick by your team and protect your damage dealer by front lining.

emblems.emblem_desc: The go to emblem set for Balmond, the fighter emblem gives him additional spell vamp which synergizes well with his second skill and is paired with Festival of Blood and Brave Smite. Thrill gives him additional physical attack. Thrill can be replaced with Vitality for extra health or rupture for an additional physical penetration.
An alternate emblem set that gives additional bulk with the trade back of low spell vamp capability.

equips.equip_desc:
This build is Balmond's standard build and is one of the most effective.

War Axe and Queen's Wings are Balmond's core items that gives additional spell vamp which increases Balmond's sustain. Queen's Wings passive also reduces incoming damage if Balmond's below 40% HP allowing him to stay in a fight longer.

The 3 items are now situational so build accordingly, to what the team or what you need to counter a specific enemy hero.

If you want to increase Balmond's passive heal by Oracle; if you want to reduce the enemy's lifesteal, spell vamp, or healing effects buy Dominance Ice. Buy Brutes Force Breastplate for physical defense and additional damage output; build Antique Cuirass against heroes with high physical damage output. Buy Athena's Shield against Burst Damage mages or magic damage dealers; buy Radiant Armor against continuous damage mages or magic damage dealers.

This build is used by Balmond if the enemies usually consists of squishy heroes that can be easily bursted.

Sky Piercer synergizes well with Balmond's ultimate as it can increase the damage output and saves you time from calculating the possible damage of your ult and allows you to spam it frequently.

This build is used by Balmond in certain team compositions that relies on support roams and needs a proper frontliner or lacks one.

Without War Axe, you can use Cursed Helmet, its passive deals damage against nearby enemies and synergizes well with Balmond's second skill.

The last 3 items are situational, so build accordingly to your needs or a way to counter a specific hero.

hero.hero_overview: Balmond received a buff to his first skill in patch 2.1.30 where it can now reduce an enemy's physical defense by 40% with a duration of 3 seconds. This makes Balmond an above average hero to use in the EXP lane and a potential pro-scene return.
hero.hero_strength: Balmond can regenerate health by killing creeps, minions, or heroes allowing him to sustain and stay in team fights as a frontliner. His first skill physical defense drop also applies to his allies which helps Balmond synergize with physical damage junglers increasing their damage output. Balmond's ultimate also allows him to secure important kills since it deals more damage the lower the enemy's HP percentage.
hero.hero_weakness: Balmond lacks crowd control to be an effective frontliner. (although this can be fixed with petrify, the trade back is that Balmond's sustain drops without vengeance.) Balmond also struggles with heroes with high mobility since his main damage output is his second skill that needs to be close to an enemy, and his ultimate can be dodged easily which can lead to frequent misplays if not timed correctly.

data.recommend: An in-depth guide and an overview for Balmond and the buff he received in patch 2.1.30

spell.spell_desc:
Vengeance is a go to battle spell for every sustain hero and Balmond is one of them. This allows Balmond to tank more damage and also returning half of it to the damage dealer.

In some certain situations, you can use other battle spells for Balmond:

Flicker - A good way to escape quickly after securing a kill or in a teamfight, this also allows you to do the Flicker + Ult combo which catches enemies off guard.

Petrify - Fixes his lack of crowd control and allows you to lock an enemy close to him giving free hits for his second skill and landing his ultimate more accurately.

Revitalize - In team compositions where a healer has strong healing effects or revitalize, Balmond can use revitalize and receive double heal effects allowing him to stay in a fight longer.

data.title: A Guide to Balmond EXP (PATCH 2.1.30)

dominants.dominant_desc:
1. Clear jungle camps (Buff and Monster camps) for gold and experience.
2. Take the enemy's buff (if possible) to deny enemy gold and experience.
3. Destroy enemy creep waves to control key areas.
4. Harass the enemy laner (if opportunities arise).
dominants.dominant_title: Balmond must do before reaching level 4

hero.hero_overview: Balmond, the Bloody Beast, is a fighter hero who crushes his enemies with a gigantic axe and brute strength. He's a great hero for beginners to pick up and learn quickly, thanks to his simple yet devastating combos ¹. With his passive skill, Bloodthirst, Balmond recovers a percentage of his max HP on minion or creep kills, and a larger percentage on hero kills, making him a dominant laner
hero.hero_strength:
1. High Damage: Balmond deals massive physical damage, especially with his Cyclone Sweep and Lethal Counter skills.
2. Durability: His passive skill, Bloodthirst, allows him to regenerate HP, making him a formidable tank.
3. Initiation: Soul Lock enables Balmond to initiate team fights or chase down enemies.
4. Crowd Control: Cyclone Sweep slows enemies, setting them up for easy kills.
5. Jungling: Balmond excels in the jungle, thanks to his ability to clear camps quickly and sustain himself.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Cooldown Dependence: Balmond relies heavily on his skills, which have relatively long cooldowns.
2. Limited Range: His abilities have short ranges, making him vulnerable to long-range heroes.
3. Vulnerability to CC: Balmond struggles against heroes with strong crowd control, as it prevents him from using his skills.
4. Kiting: His slow movement speed makes him susceptible to kiting 
5. Team Fight Positioning: Balmond needs to position himself carefully in team fights to avoid taking unnecess

spell.spell_desc: Retribution: Ideal for jungle Balmond, allowing for quick clearing of creeps and securing critical objectives

emblems.emblem_desc: Membuat Balmond lebih sustain dengan damage yang tetap proper

equips.equip_desc: Thunder Belt optional, dapat digantikan dengan Dominance Ice jika roamernya dalam tim masih membutuhkan

hero.hero_overview: Balmond adalah fighter tanky dengan regenerasi tinggi dan kemampuan clear lane cepat. Dengan damage besar dari ultimate-nya, Balmond unggul dalam team fight dan sangat efektif mengamankan objektif seperti Turtle dan Lord.
hero.hero_strength: Balmond memiliki regen HP yang tinggi, memungkinkan dia bertahan lama di lane tanpa harus sering kembali ke base. Kemampuan clear-nya cepat, dan burst damage dari ultimate Lethal Counter sangat efektif untuk menghabisi musuh yang sekarat dan mencuri objektif penting. Mobilitas yang cukup baik dari Furious Charge juga memungkinkannya bermain agresif atau bertahan ketika dibutuhkan.
hero.hero_weakness: Balmond cukup rentan terhadap hero burst damage tinggi dan memiliki crowd control (CC) yang terbatas, sehingga sulit mengunci hero lawan. Dia juga butuh momentum, jadi akan terasa lemah jika tertinggal dalam gold atau tidak mendapatkan kill. Hero dengan jarak serang jauh juga menjadi tantangan karena Balmond perlu mendekat untuk memberikan damage optimal.

data.recommend: Panduan Balmond: Rekomendasi Solo Push dan Duo/Trio di Rank Epic hingga Honor

spell.spell_desc: Memberikan true damage ke monster jungle atau minion, mempercepat farming. Setelah upgrade dengan item jungle, bisa memberikan efek tambahan pada hero musuh.

data.title: Main Balmond Auto GG: Tips & Trik Jadi Penguasa Land of Dawn!
